data.content: Shipment complete. Commits dd27ece5 (Show loading feedback on repo switch) and a4e13b1f (Clear stale repo data during repo switches) were already present on origin/main. CI passed (both CI and Coverage Badge green) on a4e13b1f. No merge conflicts. Acceptance criteria verified in prior implementation review: stale content cleared immediately on repo switch, loading indicator shown until new data ready, background refetches do not blank screen.
